description: With the lockdown lifted, Mack, Yo-Yo, and May lead Mack's parents safely out, and General Stoner shows gratitude to May before following her advice to evacuate. Mack struggles with the emotional burden of keeping secrets from his parents during their escape, while May and Elena coordinate their next steps following Coulson's apparent death.

transcript.line: Looks like my team just disrupted your lockdown.
This is not how I planned on spending Lady Liberty's 200th.
Okay, we'll head for the Quinjet.
Thank you for saving my skin. That is literal. I'd like to buy you a beverage of your choice if that is a welcome gesture.
As a saboteur, you don't technically report to me, Melinda.
I'm Level 7. Technically, you'd report to me. But your job's just beginning. Clear out the base, create a cover story. Perhaps a “Hydrogen Wave Crisis”.
This would make one hell of a report.
Was he in that explosion? Is he dead?
